SgsGenius.title: SgsGenius
SgsGenius.description: Represents the main SGS Genius application data.

id.description: Unique identifier for the SGS Genius application instance.

name.description: The name of the SGS application.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the application was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the application was last updated.

ChatMessage.title: ChatMessage
ChatMessage.description: Represents a single chat message within the SGS Genius application. This is also used for Occurrences.

id.description: Unique identifier for the chat message.

sgsGeniusId.description: Reference to the SGS Genius application this message belongs to. (Relationship: SgsGenius 1:N ChatMessage)

sender.description: Indicates who sent the message (e.g., 'user' or 'ai').

message.description: The content of the chat message.

timestamp.description: Timestamp indicating when the message was sent.

Parameter.title: Parameter
Parameter.description: Represents a modifiable parameter within the SGS Genius application.

sgsGeniusId.description: Reference to the SGS Genius application this parameter belongs to. (Relationship: SgsGenius 1:N Parameter)

value.description: The current value of the parameter.

dataType.description: The data type of the parameter (e.g., 'string', 'number', 'boolean').

description.description: A description of what the parameter controls.

RiskTreatment.title: RiskTreatment
RiskTreatment.description: Represents a single risk treatment record.

id.description: Unique identifier for the risk treatment.

userId.description: The ID of the user who created this record.

treatmentDate.description: The date of the risk identification.

treatmentLocation.description: The location where the risk was identified.

description.description: A detailed description of the risk.

proposedTreatment.description: The proposed treatment for the risk.

actionTaken.description: The action taken to mitigate the risk.

mapMarker.description: Coordinates of the marker on the map.

situation.description: The current status of the treatment.

completionDate.description: The due date for the treatment conclusion.

FaunaFloraGeoRecord.title: FaunaFloraGeoRecord
FaunaFloraGeoRecord.description: Represents a single Fauna, Flora, or Geo record.

userId.description: The ID of the user who created this record.

speciesType.description: The species or type being recorded.

description.description: A detailed description of the record.

mapMarker.description: Coordinates of the marker on the map.

RiskAssessment.title: RiskAssessment
RiskAssessment.description: Represents a single risk assessment record.

id.description: Unique identifier for the risk assessment.

userId.description: The ID of the user who created this record.

assessmentDate.description: The date of the risk assessment.

location.description: The location where the risk was assessed.

taskDescription.description: A description of the task or activity being assessed.

riskSource.description: The risk(s) and their generating source(s).

effects.description: The potential effects or consequences of the risk.

existingControls.description: The existing controls to mitigate the risk.

recommendedControls.description: The recommended controls to further mitigate the risk.

situation.description: The current status of the assessment.

completionDate.description: The due date for the conclusion of recommended controls.

Equipment.title: Equipment
Equipment.description: Represents a single piece of equipment.

userId.description: The ID of the user who owns this equipment record.

lotCaUiaa.description: The lot, CA, or UIAA number.

manufacturingDate.description: The manufacturing date of the equipment.

storageDetails.description: Specific details about the storage location (e.g., shelf, box).

status.description: The current status of the equipment.

lastInspectionDate.description: The date of the last inspection.

nextInspectionDate.description: The date for the next scheduled inspection.

id.description: Unique identifier for the activity record.

userId.description: The ID of the user who registered the activity.

activityName.description: The name of the activity being performed.

pop.description: The selected POP document for the activity.

tcr.description: The selected TCR document for the activity.

riskAssessmentLocation.description: The locations associated with the risk assessment for this activity.

createdAt.description: Timestamp of when the activity was registered.

Notice.title: Notice
Notice.description: Represents a single notice or observation record.

userId.description: The ID of the user who created this record.

collaboratorName.description: The name of the collaborator reporting the notice.

noticeDate.description: The date and time of the observation.

weather.description: Weather conditions at the time of the notice.

description.description: A detailed description of the observation.

location.description: The general location of the observation.

mapMarker.description: Coordinates of the marker on the map.

status.description: The current status of the notice.

ProfilePasses.title: ProfilePasses
ProfilePasses.description: Stores the 6-digit numeric passes for Admin and Observer profiles.

adminPass.description: The 6-digit numeric pass for the Administrator profile.

observerPass.description: The 6-digit numeric pass for the Observer profile.

definition.description: Stores the main SGS Genius application data. Each document represents a unique SGS application instance.

params.name: sgsGeniusId
params.description: Unique identifier for the SGS Genius application instance.

definition.description: Stores chat messages and occurrences associated with a specific SGS Genius application. Includes the sgsGeniusId for relationship.

params.name: sgsGeniusId
params.description: The ID of the SGS Genius application to which this message belongs.

params.name: chatMessageId
params.description: Unique identifier for the chat message/occurrence.

definition.description: Stores modifiable parameters associated with a specific SGS Genius application. Includes the sgsGeniusId for relationship.

params.name: sgsGeniusId
params.description: The ID of the SGS Genius application to which this parameter belongs.

definition.description: Stores risk treatment records for a user.

params.name: riskTreatmentId
params.description: Unique identifier for the risk treatment record.

definition.description: Stores Fauna, Flora, and Geo records for a user.
Stores risk assessment records for a user.

params.name: assessmentId
params.description: Unique identifier for the risk assessment record.

definition.description: Stores equipment records for a user.

params.name: equipmentId
params.description: Unique identifier for the equipment record.

definition.description: Stores registered activity sessions for a user.

params.name: activityId
params.description: Unique identifier for the activity record.

definition.description: Stores notice records for a user.

params.name: noticeId
params.description: Unique identifier for the notice record.

definition.description: Stores profile passcodes for a user.

params.name: settingId
params.description: The name of the setting, e.g., 'profiles'.

firestore.reasoning:
The Firestore structure is designed to support the SGS Genius application, focusing on chat interactions with an AI and parameter adjustments. It provides a secure and scalable data model, suitable for the app's collaborative and iterative development process. The structure prioritizes Authorization Independence through denormalization, simplifies security rules via Structural Segregation, and standardizes access patterns using Access Modeling. This design supports atomic operations and efficient `list` operations while upholding data integrity.

Authorization Independence:
Authorization independence is achieved by avoiding hierarchical authorization dependencies. There are no `get()` calls in the security rules. Every collection has all of the authorization information needed in the document itself.

QAPs (Rules are not Filters):
The structure is designed to support secure `list` operations. This is accomplished by segregating data based on access requirements and using membership maps to define access rights. Segregation means that rules do not have to filter based on document content and membership maps mean that list access can be controlled.
